# Strange Advanced Marketing (S.A.M)

> S.A.M builds AI systems that run your business through voice notes. No apps, no code, no laptop required.

## About
- Founded by Jereme Strange, AI Architect, Miami FL
- Remote deployment worldwide via Tailscale SSH
- Custom AI stacks installed on client hardware — you own your system
- Starting at $299/month flat rate, no lock-ins

## Services
- Voice-to-Execution AI Systems: Business automation through Telegram, WhatsApp, or Slack
- AI Stack Deployment: Custom Claude/OpenAI systems installed on your own machine
- Lead Generation: Google Maps scraping, competitor analysis, review mining
- Business Intelligence: Strange Intel geopolitical and market briefs

## Products
- Google Maps Lead Generator (Apify)
- Google Maps Reviews Analyzer (Apify)
- Google Maps Competitor Analyzer (Apify)
- Business Website Analyzer (Apify)
- Email Finder and Verifier (Apify)
- Satellite Quoter: AI-powered property measurement for contractors
- Strange Intel: Daily geopolitical and energy intelligence briefs
- Adam Framework: Open-source AI memory system (MIT licensed)
- Claude Buddy: Real-time AI tool call monitoring (MIT licensed)
